heading: Our Services
subheading: Professional mahjong experiences for every occasion

services.title: Private Lessons
services.description: One-on-one or small-group instruction tailored to your pace. Perfect for beginners learning the basics or players refining their strategy. We'll teach you how to play with points.

services.title: Office Workshops
services.description: Team-building sessions designed for the workplace. Break the ice, build connections, and give your team a fresh way to unwind together. We bring sets, mats, and instructors. We send invoices through Stripe and accept credit card payments.

services.title: Business Collaborations
services.description: Elevate your next event with a curated mahjong experience. We team up with brands, businesses, and organizations for custom pop-ups, collaborative marketing, and unique experiences that get people talking.
